meta.title: Crystal Weaving Navigation
meta.description: Braid algebra, permutation fiber atlases, and navigation laws for crystal weaving across odd families (3,5,7,9), including PS cross-braid, mixed lock atlas, AZ4 compression gate, and 96-stub transport classifier.

braid_algebra.description: n! permutation endpoints via adjacent swap generators on labeled strands
braid_algebra.principle: A braid on n labeled strings is a permutation of those n labels at the end. Adjacent swaps generate every permutation.

s9.note: N_+ and N_- are shadow/nodal return crossings making 9 the return crown

braid_algebra.lehmer_rank_law: rho_n(pi) = sum_{i=1}^{n-1} d_i(pi) * (n-i)! where d_i = #{j>i : pi_j < pi_i}
braid_algebra.canonical_braid_witness: beta_star(pi) = product of factoradic-derived sigma blocks

reweave_coordinate.description: RWLC extends the liminal coordinate with braid fields

operators.R3: tri-current braid on (Su,Me,Sa): changes local 6D anti-spin ordering and phase leadership
operators.R5: gear/tilt braid: changes steering mode and zoom preference
operators.R7: timing braid: changes gate windows and route openness
operators.R9: return braid: changes re-entry, nodal inversion, and octave handoff

propagation_receipt.description: Every reweave emits a full nested receipt across all bodies

weaving_patterns.description: Permutation fiber atlases for each odd family with four-lens rendering

P3.description: Tri-current permutation fiber — hexagonal Cayley graph

P5.description: Pentadic steering crystal — 5 coarse phases x 24 microcells
P5.split: rho_5 = 5*j5 + phi_5 where phi_5 in Z_5 (coarse phase), j5 in [0,23] (microcell)

P7.description: Heptadic spoke-canopy atlas — 7 spoke gates x 720 canopy microcells
P7.split: rho_7 = 720*s7 + j7 where s7 in [0,6] (spoke gate), j7 in [0,719] (canopy)

P9.description: Enneadic return superfield — 36 nodal placements x 2 polarities x 5040 visible heptadic body

lens_renderers.Square: exact committed placement — SlotMap, rank, permutation
lens_renderers.Flower: inversion set, descent set, sign — corridor/pressure/current structure
lens_renderers.Cloud: endpoint fiber F_pi = {beta in B_n : bar(beta) = pi} — lawful multiplicity bundle
lens_renderers.Fractal: replay seed — uniform (pi^{wr k}) or free ((S_n)^k) recursive replay family

weaving_patterns.universal_upgrade_law: rho_n = n*j_n + phi_n, so each old coarse odd phase splits into (n-1)! microstates: 3->2, 5->24, 7->720, 9->40320

navigation_rules.description: Exact braid-based navigation laws governing crystal traversal

braided_navigation.formula: Nav_braid(x, pi*, t) = argmin_{beta: rho(beta)=pi*} (|beta| + Cost_live(LiveRoute(x, BraidLift(beta)(x), t)))
steps: route: live-lock first, zero next, traversal last

navigation_rules.navigation_chain: address -> braid_act -> propagation_receipt -> live_lock -> zero -> route -> return

local_navigation.distance_metric: d_n(pi, tau) = l(pi^{-1} * tau) = inversion count of the relative permutation

navigation_rules.infinity_law: finite permutation fiber x unbounded replay depth x multi-lens observation = exact infinite crystal navigation

crystal_routes.description: PS cross-braid, mixed-lock atlas, AZ4 gate, and 96-stub transport classes

PS_cross_braid.description: Braid-of-braids stage where P3,P5,P7,P9 interact under meta-braid

two_braid_levels.internal: beta_n in B_n — family-internal endpoint braids

PS_cross_braid.resonant_spine: gcd(3,5,7,9) = 1, so one universal phase spine

mixed_lock_atlas.description: 10 named mixed locks governing odd-family compatibility

L_39.type: triadic return gate (only pair with nontrivial resonant lanes)

mixed_lock_atlas.heptadic_echo_defect: delta_79 = (pi_7)^{-1} * pi_7^{(9)} in S_7 — compares standalone P7 with heptadic body inside P9

AZ4_compression_gate.description: Generator-first reseed of constructive 108D crown into dual-pole 4D seed
AZ4_compression_gate.formula: AZ4Gate = O_AZ . O_{G/R} . O_H . O_L . O_Z

operator_cards.card_1_zero_bind: Route to lawful zero family before reseed
operator_cards.card_3_helm_pack: Pack crown helm (tau_3, b_4, tau_5, tau_7, vartheta, K_420, K_1260)
operator_cards.card_4_gen_residual: Generator-first compression: generator stores repeating whole, residual stores local deformation
operator_cards.card_5_az4_emit: Bind A+ constructive pole with Z- neutral collapse pole into replayable cockpit

transport_96_stub.description: 96-stub visible runtime surface classified into 7 transport classes

classes.CE: chart equivalence — same payload/lens, only chart face changes
classes.XL: exact local refinement — same node, hidden route exact
classes.RL: residual local refinement — same node, hidden route lawful but incomplete
classes.XC: exact crown transport — different nodes, macro compatibility exact on both ends
classes.ZR: zero-return transport — docks to total-witness via zero tunnel
classes.HO: handoff/successor transport — compiled ascent via E10 conductor
classes.IL: illegal — live-lock or shared zero fails
